response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified two distinct sections: a talking segment followed by a song performance. At 04:09, on-screen text identified the song as "君にしか読めない手紙" and the composer/lyricist as "HoneyWorks" (also mentioning MARUMOCHI). The performer in the video is Kazama Iroha. I used the search query '"君にしか読めない手紙" HoneyWorks Japanese and English lyrics' to successfully retrieve the lyrics in both Japanese and English.
response.global_summary: Kazama Iroha introduces her birthday merchandise, followed by a live performance of the song "Kimi ni Shika Yomenai Tegami" by HoneyWorks.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha talks about her birthday merchandise and makes announcements.
Kazama Iroha performs the song "Kimi ni Shika Yomenai Tegami".
scenes.song_title: 君にしか読めない手紙 (Kimi ni Shika Yomenai Tegami)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ありがとう書くとしたら
毎日になっちゃうくらい
重すぎる私の想いは
最後に伝えるね
lalala
拝啓 私を形作った君へ
相も変わらず言葉を
届け続けています
lalala
拝啓 未来で私待ってる君へ
響く音に憂いなど
膜を過ごすでしょうか
不安が無いなんて
多分無かったけど
私の言葉
君の言葉
重なって笑えたんだ
ありがとう書くとしたら
毎日になっちゃうくらい

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If I were to write "thank you"
It would probably be every day
My feelings are too heavy
I'll tell you at the end
lalala
Dear, to you who shaped me
As always, I'm
Continuing to deliver my words
lalala
Dear, to you who is waiting for me in the future
Are you spending your days
Without any sorrow in the echoing sounds?
If I were to say there's no anxiety
That probably wasn't true, but
My words
Your words
Overlapped, and we were able to laugh
If I were to write "thank you"
It would probably be every day
My feelings are too heavy
I'll tell you at the end
